## What this PR does

_Brief description of changes (1-2 sentences)_

---

## Evidence Standard check

### Content Compliance
- [ ] **All claims have source URLs** (or `[SOURCE NEEDED]` markers for drafts)
- [ ] **All sources have tier ratings** (Tier 1-3 based on reliability)
- [ ] **All inference is labeled `[INFERENCE]`** when not directly evidenced
- [ ] **No identity labels** (Constitution Article 3.1 - no "terrorist", "regime", etc.)
- [ ] **No editorializing** - neutral, evidence-based language only

### Technical Requirements
- [ ] **Content schema validation passes** (no build errors)
- [ ] **All URLs are accessible** (or archived with `[ARCHIVE NEEDED]` markers)
- [ ] **Frontmatter complete** for content type (autopsy/actor/conflict)
- [ ] **Local testing completed** with `npm run dev`

### Constitutional Compliance
- [ ] **Article 2**: Evidence tiers properly applied
- [ ] **Article 3**: No framing by omission or identity labels
- [ ] **Article 4**: Dispute resolution process followed
- [ ] **Article 7**: Source requirements met

---
